name: kavachpay
description: > *"Don't trust location. Trust behavior. Trust work. Trust truth."*

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd ml-service && venv\\Scripts\\python.exe main.py"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && (cd ml-service && python -m venv venv && source venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt)
